name: Thai Soup for Marty
recipeIngredient: 1 stalk of lemon grass, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, cook chicken in boiling water for 10 minutes.
2. Add lemon grass and galangal, and cook for an additional 7-8 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients, except for the mint leaves and lemon juice, and simmer on low heat for about 15-20 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in lemon juice.
5. Sprinkle with mint.
6. Serve hot with rice.
